build_status: research wave complete (waves 9 + 10); post-build hooks pending

ORG_RESEARCH.topic: Target organisation strategy, structure, and existing systems
ORG_RESEARCH.agent_summary: Bimodal adopter posture (SaaS-friendly civilian/NHS/local-gov vs sovereign-only MOD). Existing-systems baseline = GOV.UK Design System + landing zones + GitHub-flavoured authoring + Microsoft 365/Entra. Procurement and sovereignty stance is mandatory not optional — G-Cloud (BR-004) and UK data residency (Principle 7) are floor not aspiration.

RESEARCH.topic: Technology and vendor market research (build vs buy, TCO)
RESEARCH.agent_summary: BUY managed primitives (AWS eu-west-2 primary + Azure UK South cross-vendor floor) for cell topology ~£58–71k/cell/yr. BUY Bedrock as primary AI + Azure OpenAI as ADR-004 second; ADOPT open-weight Llama-3/Mistral self-host as project 002 sovereign default. 3-yr SaaS-control-plane TCO ~£1.92M mid-point; reconciles cleanly against SOBC £2.85M OpEx envelope (£0.93M overhead lines outside scope).

AWS_RESEARCH.topic: AWS service availability + architecture patterns + UK region
AWS_RESEARCH.agent_summary: EKS one-cluster-per-cell (~£324/mo), RDS PostgreSQL Multi-AZ + S3 Object Lock with KMS-CMK and CRR to eu-west-1 (~£280–470/mo), Bedrock Claude/Llama/Cohere via provider-agnostic adaptor (~£300–1,500/mo capped by ADR-008). Total 3-cell GA estimate £4,680/mo (£153k 3-yr TCO). 14/14 NCSC CSP and full CAF v3 mapped via AWS Config conformance packs. eu-west-2 confirmed for all services via MCP.

AZURE_RESEARCH.topic: Azure service availability + architecture patterns + UK South / UK West
AZURE_RESEARCH.agent_summary: AKS Standard tier UK South 3-AZ cell-per-tenant (~£580/cell/mo); Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server GP D4ds_v5 ZR-HA + RLS (~£640/cell/mo); Azure OpenAI UK South (gpt-4o + gpt-3.5 only, newer models out-of-region) with Modified Abuse Monitoring opt-in (~£1,200/cell/mo). Total ~£5,940/cell/mo, 3-yr TCO £367.7k for 3 cells. KEY constraints: API Management v2 UK South temporary creation block (UK West fallback), MAM application required pre-GA, GOV.UK One Login federates via Entra External ID custom-OIDC.

GCP_RESEARCH.topic: Google Cloud service availability + architecture patterns + europe-west2
GCP_RESEARCH.agent_summary: GKE Autopilot europe-west2 (~£1,650/cell/mo pre-CUD); Cloud SQL Postgres 15 Enterprise Plus Regional HA + RLS + CMEK (~£780/cell/mo); Vertex AI Gemini 2.5 Pro/Flash with KEY constraint — eu multi-region NOT UK-pinnable, requires UK IDTA + SCC for OFFICIAL data, so Anthropic on AWS Bedrock europe-west2 used as UK-pinned alternate. Per-cell ~£4,250/mo; 3-yr TCO ~£498k pre-CUD / £430k with 1+3yr CUDs. Workload Identity Federation + Binary Authorization + Cosign close NFR-SEC-005/006.

GOV_REUSE.topic: UK government code reuse search via govreposcrape
GOV_REUSE.agent_summary: Top reuse: alphagov/govuk-frontend (Library, MIT, ~30 days saved on FR-013 + WCAG 2.2 AA); alphagov/notifications-python-client + notifications-node-client (Library, ~8 days saved on INT-004 email); ministryofjustice/modernisation-platform (Reference/Fork, ~60 days saved on Terraform AWS landing-zone). Total ~137 person-days saved. BUILD-NEW gaps: multi-tenant isolation, tamper-evident audit logging, Companies House client, Mermaid renderer, Markdown/AsciiDoc renderer with GOV.UK styling, EA-tooling adapters.

ADR-008.note: Per-Tenant Quotas, Rate Limits, Fair Use

DPIA.note: 15 risks all Low residual; ICO Art. 36 NOT REQUIRED

SVCASS.headline: Beta-target RAG: 4 Green / 6 Amber / 4 Red of 14. Top critical gaps: Point 5 (a11y audit), Point 9 (pen test), Point 12 (OSS).

SOBC.headline: Option 2 recommended (Balanced + cross-subsidy + G-Cloud). NPV +£6.9M, BCR ~2.7, payback ~22 months. Break-even GA + 18m.

HLD.headline: APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS — 4 blocking items: threat model + CAF, SLO/error-budget, Cell Management component, FinOps component.

DEVOPS.headline: 5-stage pipeline (source/build/test/security/deploy) + hermetic signed sovereign bundle. 3 release-blocking gates: tenant-iso tests, reproducible-build digest, sovereign no-egress smoke.

FINOPS.headline: Break-even GA + 18m. Top 3 levers: AI provider substitution (-20–35%), per-tenant quotas (-15–25%), commitment purchases (-15–35%). 3 KRIs to RISK §J.

PLAN.headline: GA target 2027-04-30. Critical path: AI abstraction (R-006/R-017), tenant isolation (R-008/R-014), pilot recruitment (R-003).

ROADMAP.headline: 3-year horizon. Y1 GA + 10 must-lands. Y2 Live + ≥200 SMEs. Y3 cross-subsidy break-even + ISO 27001 + sovereign productisation.

DIAG-C4.headline: C4 Context (13 elements) + Container (32) + Component (12 across C1 + C5). Highlights: namespace-per-tenant, tenant_id propagation, pluggable AI.

DIAG-SEQ.headline: 5 sequence diagrams: onboarding, OIDC SSO, AI generation, export/exit, audit query. Theme: tenant_id at every boundary; audit-log on every state change.

DIAG-DEP.headline: 3 views: SaaS cell-per-tier topology, sovereign air-gapped variant, network/trust-zone with mTLS + Article 46.

OPS.headline: SLO 99.9%/RTO<4h/RPO<15min. 5+ runbooks incl. cross-tenant leak (ICO 72h template), SAR/erasure, AI sub-processor incident, CH outage, IdP compromise. DR drill quarterly.

TRACE.headline: 100% coverage. 17/17 risks traced. 14/14 SDs → 8/8 Goals → 7/7 Outcomes → 8/8 BRs (7✅+1⚠️) → 15/15 FRs → 33 NFRs (21✅+12⚠️). 3 orphans, 3 gaps identified.

waves.note: Sequential at the time, but dependency-wise SBD/DPIA/AIP are a chain (SBD→DPIA→AIP)
First production run of the harness. 5 agents in parallel. Each invoked its /arckit:* skill in isolation. Total content generated: 5,245 lines. Sequential equivalent would have been ~30-45 minutes.
5 agents in parallel. Total content generated: 4,077 lines including 12 Mermaid diagrams (4 C4 + 5 sequence + 3 deployment).
1 agent. 759 lines. Full traceability matrix; all 17 risks covered; 3 orphans + 3 gaps identified for follow-up.
1 agent. 604 lines. Target-organisation research output to projects/000-global/research/ — shared across all projects in repo per recipe.

5 parallel research agents. Total content: 4,643 lines. RESEARCH agent additionally produced side-effect content (vendors/aws-profile.md, vendors/microsoft-azure-profile.md, vendors/grafana-labs-profile.md, tech-notes/multi-tenant-isolation-pool-with-cells.md, tech-notes/ai-provider-abstraction.md, tech-notes/opentelemetry-observability.md) — captured in commit but not in the recipe DAG.
